answer.text:
Dear Marah,

Due to restrictions in the MIV Invoice module, the bill-to customer can only be the actual customer instead of the Office Rep customer. Please try to revise the customer code and try again.


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Tuesday, January 13, 2026 at 13:51
To: Kieran Ji/CUL-CN/IT <kieranji@culines.com>, Amber Hu/CUL-CN/FIN <amberhu@culines.com>, Louis Xia/CUL-CN/CS <louisxia@culines.com>, DANIEL CHEN/CUL-West Asia <danielchen@culines.com>, Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com>, Kieran Ji/CUL-C
